Source: Web Fetch (bitcoinmagazine.com/.rss/full/)
Fetched at: 2026-07-11T03:32:16.572Z
---
Bitcoin Magazine RSS Feed - Fri, 10 Jul 2026 20:23:56 +0000

1. U.S. Representatives Urge Senate to Vote on CLARITY Act in July, Address Ethics Concerns
   Rep. French Hill urged Senate vote before August recess. CLARITY Act pairs with GENIUS Act. Polymarket predicts Clarity Act 2026 passage near 39%, down from 74% prior month.

2. Circle (CRCL) Wins Final OCC Approval for National Trust Bank
   Circle to charter First National Digital Currency Bank, N.A. CRCL shares climbed 14% on announcement. OCC approval caps process started June 2025.

3. Metaplanet Announces Joint Study to Bring Bitcoin-Backed Digital Credit to Japan
   Study group: Metaplanet, JPYC, Progmat, Siiibo Securities. Metaplanet holds 43,000 BTC ($2.47B). Project Nova strategy.

4. Bitcoin is "A Screaming Buy": Standard Chartered Backs $100,000 Target
   Geoffrey Kendrick maintains end-2026 $100,000 BTC target. Strategy's (MSTR) sell-off reflects communication issue, not balance sheet deterioration.

5. JPMorgan Says the Real Threat to Bitcoin Isn't Strategy (MSTR) — It's Private Blockchains
   Banks adopting private blockchains could reduce activity on public networks. Tokenization markets near $50B but could migrate to private infrastructure.

6. Bitcoin's New Debt Machine is Facing Its First Major Test
   June was first stress test for Bitcoin-backed preferred shares (STRC, SATA). STRC fell to $75, recovered to $87. Public treasuries added ~7,300 BTC net in June.

7. New Hampshire Council Rejects $100 Million Bitcoin-Backed Bond
